revision.text:
{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''жИКзФ≥'''пЉИгБ§гБ°гБЃгБИгБХгВЛгАБгБЉгБ©гБЃгБХгВЛгАБгБЉгБЧгВУгАБ{{жЛЉйЯ≥|w√єshƒУn}}гАБ{{ж≥®йЯ≥|гД®ЋЛ гДХгД£}}гАБ{{lang-ko|лђімЛ†}}гАБ{{lang-vi|{{Unicode|MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn}}}}пЉЙгБѓгАБ[[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]]гБЃдЄАгБ§гАВ
Sexagenary cycle comprehensiveгБЃзµДгБњеРИгВПгБЫгБЃ45зХ™зЫЃгБІгАБеЙНгБѓ[[дЄБжЬ™]]гАБжђ°гБѓ[[еЈ±йЕЙ]]гБІгБВгВЛгАВ[[йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°М]]гБІгБѓгАБ[[еНБеє≤]]гБЃ[[жИК]]гБѓйЩљгБЃ[[еЬЯ]]гАБ[[еНБдЇМжФѓ]]гБЃ[[зФ≥]]гБѓйЩљгБЃ[[йЗС]]гБІгАБ[[дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥#зЫЄзФЯпЉИгБЭгБЖгБШгВЗгБЖпЉЙ|зЫЄзФЯ]]пЉИеЬЯзФЯйЗСпЉЙгБІгБВгВЛгАВ
==жИКзФ≥гБЃеєі== [[и•њжЪ¶]]еєігВТ60гБІеЙ≤гБ£гБ¶48гБМдљЩгВЛеєігБМжИКзФ≥гБЃ[[еєі]]гБ®гБ™гВЛгАВ {| class="wikitable" |+'''жИКзФ≥гБЃеєі''' |- ![[1еНГеєізіА]]!![[2еНГеєізіА]]!![[3еНГеєізіА]] |- | *[[48еєі]] *[[108еєі]] *[[168еєі]] *[[228еєі]] *[[288еєі]] *[[348еєі]] *[[408еєі]] *[[468еєі]] *[[528еєі]] *[[588еєі]] *[[648еєі]] *[[708еєі]] *[[768еєі]] *[[828еєі]] *[[888еєі]] *[[948еєі]] | *[[1008еєі]] *[[1068еєі]] *[[1128еєі]] *[[1188еєі]] *[[1248еєі]] *[[1308еєі]] *[[1368еєі]] *[[1428еєі]] *[[1488еєі]] *[[1548еєі]] *[[1608еєі]] *[[1668еєі]] *[[1728еєі]] *[[1788еєі]] *[[1848еєі]] *[[1908еєі]] *[[1968еєі]] | *[[2028еєі]] *[[2088еєі]] *[[2148еєі]] *[[2208еєі]] *[[2268еєі]] *[[2328еєі]] *[[2388еєі]] *[[2448еєі]] *[[2508еєі]] *[[2568еєі]] *[[2628еєі]] *[[2688еєі]] *[[2748еєі]] *[[2808еєі]] *[[2868еєі]] *[[2928еєі]] *[[2988еєі]] |} ===еЗЇжЭ•дЇЛ=== *[[жШОж≤ї]]41еєіпЉИ1908еєіпЉЙ - [[жИКзФ≥и©ФжЫЄ]]гВТзЩЇеЄГгАВ *1968еєі - [[гГЩгГИгГКгГ†жИ¶дЇЙ]]гБЃ[[гГЖгГИжФїеЛҐ]]гАВгГЩгГИгГКгГ†и™ЮгБІгБѓ {{Unicode|Sбї± kiбїЗn TбЇњt MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn}}пЉИдЇЛдїґзѓАжИКзФ≥пЉЙгБ®и®АгБЖгАВ
==жИКзФ≥гБЃжЬИ== и•њжЪ¶еєігБЃдЄЛ1ж°БгБМ2гГї7пЉИеНБеє≤гБМ[[е£ђ]]гГї[[дЄБ]]пЉЙгБЃеєігБЃ[[7жЬИ]]гБМжИКзФ≥гБЃ[[жЬИ (жЪ¶)|жЬИ]]гБ®гБ™гВЛгАВгБЯгБ†гБЧгБУгБУгБІгБДгБЖжЬИгБѓгАБ[[жЧІжЪ¶]]гБЃжЬИгВД[[зѓАжЬИ]]пЉИ[[зЂЛзІЛ]]гБЛгВЙ[[зЩљйЬ≤]]гБЃеЙНжЧ•гБЊгБІпЉЙгВТйБ©зФ®гБЩгВЛе†іеРИгВВгБВгВЛгАВ
==жИКзФ≥гБЃжЧ•== ===йБЄжЧ•=== жИКзФ≥гБЃжЧ•гБѓ[[е§©дЄАе§©дЄК]]гБЃ16жЧ•зЫЃпЉИжЬАзµВжЧ•пЉЙгБІгБВгВЛгАВ ==йЦҐйА£й†ЕзЫЃ== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:гБ§гБ°гБЃгБИгБХгВЛ}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Earth Monkey-qq]] [[Category:жИКзФ≥]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:жИКзФ≥]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:жИКзФ≥]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:fixing the kk issue]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Earth Monkey-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[ja:жИКзФ≥]]

==жИКзФ≥гБЃеєі== [[и•њжЪ¶]]еєігВТ60гБІеЙ≤гБ£гБ¶48гБМдљЩгВЛеєігБМжИКзФ≥гБЃ[[еєі]]гБ®гБ™гВЛгАВ {| class="wikitable" |+'''жИКзФ≥гБЃеєі''' |- ![[1еНГеєізіА]]!![[2еНГеєізіА]]!![[3еНГеєізіА]] |- | *[[48еєі]] *[[108еєі]] *[[168еєі]] *[[228еєі]] *[[288еєі]] *[[348еєі]] *[[408еєі]] *[[468еєі]] *[[528еєі]] *[[588еєі]] *[[648еєі]] *[[708еєі]] *[[768еєі]] *[[828еєі]] *[[888еєі]] *[[948еєі]] | *[[1008еєі]] *[[1068еєі]] *[[1128еєі]] *[[1188еєі]] *[[1248еєі]] *[[1308еєі]] *[[1368еєі]] *[[1428еєі]] *[[1488еєі]] *[[1548еєі]] *[[1608еєі]] *[[1668еєі]] *[[1728еєі]] *[[1788еєі]] *[[1848еєі]] *[[1908еєі]] *[[1968еєі]] | *[[2028еєі]] *[[2088еєі]] *[[2148еєі]] *[[2208еєі]] *[[2268еєі]] *[[2328еєі]] *[[2388еєі]] *[[2448еєі]] *[[2508еєі]] *[[2568еєі]] *[[2628еєі]] *[[2688еєі]] *[[2748еєі]] *[[2808еєі]] *[[2868еєі]] *[[2928еєі]] *[[2988еєі]] |} ===еЗЇжЭ•дЇЛ=== *[[жШОж≤ї]]41еєіпЉИ1908еєіпЉЙ - [[жИКзФ≥и©ФжЫЄ]]гВТзЩЇеЄГгАВ *1968еєі - [[гГЩгГИгГКгГ†жИ¶дЇЙ]]гБЃ[[гГЖгГИжФїеЛҐ]]гАВгГЩгГИгГКгГ†и™ЮгБІгБѓ {{Unicode|Sбї± kiбїЗn TбЇњt MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn}}пЉИдЇЛдїґзѓАжИКзФ≥пЉЙгБ®и®АгБЖгАВ
==жИКзФ≥гБЃжЬИ== и•њжЪ¶еєігБЃдЄЛ1ж°БгБМ2гГї7пЉИеНБеє≤гБМ[[е£ђ]]гГї[[дЄБ]]пЉЙгБЃеєігБЃ[[7жЬИ]]гБМжИКзФ≥гБЃ[[жЬИ (жЪ¶)|жЬИ]]гБ®гБ™гВЛгАВгБЯгБ†гБЧгБУгБУгБІгБДгБЖжЬИгБѓгАБ[[жЧІжЪ¶]]гБЃжЬИгВД[[зѓАжЬИ]]пЉИ[[зЂЛзІЛ]]гБЛгВЙ[[зЩљйЬ≤]]гБЃеЙНжЧ•гБЊгБІпЉЙгВТйБ©зФ®гБЩгВЛе†іеРИгВВгБВгВЛгАВ
==жИКзФ≥гБЃжЧ•== ===йБЄжЧ•=== жИКзФ≥гБЃжЧ•гБѓ[[е§©дЄАе§©дЄК]]гБЃ16жЧ•зЫЃпЉИжЬАзµВжЧ•пЉЙгБІгБВгВЛгАВ ==йЦҐйА£й†ЕзЫЃ== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:гБ§гБ°гБЃгБИгБХгВЛ}} [[Category:еє≤жФѓ]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Monkey|kanji=жИКзФ≥|romaji=tsuchinoe saru|onyomi=bojin|p=w√єshƒУn|w=wu-shen|mi=uвБµвБµ В…Щn|y=mou6 san1|j=mou6 san1|ci=m…Рu В…Рn|mc=m…Щu Вin|oc-bs=m…Щ Вin|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}}'''Yang Earth Monkey'''{{жЛЉйЯ≥|w√єshƒУn|qq=}}гАБ{{ж≥®йЯ≥|гД®ЋЛ гДХгД£|qq=}}гАБ{{lang-ko|лђімЛ†|qq=}}гАБ{{lang-vi|{{Unicode|MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn|qq=}}|qq=}}) is one of the components of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}.
It is the 45th combination in the comprehensive sexagenary cycle, preceded by {{ill|Dingwei|ja|1=Yin Fire Goat|2=ja|дЄБжЬ™|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingwei|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Jiyou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|еЈ±йЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiyou|qq=}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang Five Elements theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the heavenly stem {{ill|Wu|ja|жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|lt=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|2=ja|3=жИК|4=zh|5=жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=}} represents yang earth, and the earthly branch [[:en:Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey (зФ≥)]] represents yang metal; according to the principle of [[:en:Aioi|phase generation]] (earth producing metal).
==Pronunciation== PronounciationYang Earth Monkey

--> ==Years of Yang Earth Monkey== A year is designated as a Wushen year if, when the Western calendar year is divided by 60, the remainder is 48. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Wushen''' |- ! [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 41 (1908) вАУ the issuance of the {{ill|Wushen Edict|ja|жИКзФ≥и©ФжЫЄ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen Edict|qq=}}. * In 1968 вАУ the Tet Offensive during the [[:en:Vietnam War|Vietnam War]]. In Vietnamese, it is referred to as {{Unicode|Sбї± kiбїЗn TбЇњt MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn|qq=}} (Incident Festival Wushen).
==Months of Yang Earth Monkey== In years whose last digit in the Western calendar is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Ren|ja|е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|lt=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|2=ja|3=е£ђ|4=zh|5=е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (е£ђ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Ding|ja|дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|lt=Hinoto (дЄБ)|2=ja|3=дЄБ|4=zh|5=дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=}}), the month of July is designated as the month of Wushen. (Note that in this context, вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer to a lunar month or a seasonal period [from [[:en:Liqiu|Rissh≈Ђ]] to the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro]]].)
==Days of Yang Earth Monkey== === Date Selection === The day of Wushen is the 16th day (the final day) of the {{ill|Tengitenj≈Н|ja|е§©дЄАе§©дЄК|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tengitenj≈Н|qq=}}.

==Months of Yang Earth Monkey== In years whose last digit in the Western calendar is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Ren|ja|е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|lt=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|2=ja|3=е£ђ|4=zh|5=е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (е£ђ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Ding|ja|дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|lt=Hinoto (дЄБ)|2=ja|3=дЄБ|4=zh|5=дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=}}), the month of July is designated as the month of Wushen. (Note that in this context, вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer to a lunar month or a seasonal period [from [[:en:Liqiu|Rissh≈Ђ]] to the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro]]].)
==Days of Yang Earth Monkey== === Date Selection === The day of Wushen is the 16th day (the final day) of the {{ill|Tengitenj≈Н|ja|е§©дЄАе§©дЄК|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tengitenj≈Н|qq=}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Monkey|kanji=жИКзФ≥|romaji=tsuchinoe saru|onyomi=bojin|p=w√єshƒУn|w=wu-shen|mi=uвБµвБµ В…Щn|y=mou6 san1|j=mou6 san1|ci=m…Рu В…Рn|mc=m…Щu Вin|oc-bs=m…Щ Вin|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}}'''Yang Earth Monkey'''{{жЛЉйЯ≥|w√єshƒУn|qq=}}гАБ{{ж≥®йЯ≥|гД®ЋЛ гДХгД£|qq=}}гАБ{{lang-ko|лђімЛ†|qq=}}гАБ{{lang-vi|{{Unicode|MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn|qq=}}|qq=}}) is one of the components of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}.
It is the 45th combination in the comprehensive sexagenary cycle, preceded by {{ill|Dingwei|ja|1=Yin Fire Goat|2=ja|дЄБжЬ™|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingwei|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Jiyou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|еЈ±йЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiyou|qq=}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang Five Elements theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the heavenly stem {{ill|Wu|ja|жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|lt=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|2=ja|3=жИК|4=zh|5=жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=}} represents yang earth, and the earthly branch [[:en:Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey (зФ≥)]] represents yang metal; according to the principle of [[:en:Aioi|phase generation]] (earth producing metal).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Monkey (жИКзФ≥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): w√єshƒУn ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 san1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-saru ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-saru ***Onyomi 1: boshi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): musin (лђімЛ†) ** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn

--> ==Years of Yang Earth Monkey== A year is designated as a Wushen year if, when the Western calendar year is divided by 60, the remainder is 48. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Wushen''' |- ! {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Monkey|kanji=жИКзФ≥|romaji=tsuchinoe saru|onyomi=bojin|p=w√єshƒУn|w=wu-shen|mi=uвБµвБµ В…Щn|y=mou6 san1|j=mou6 san1|ci=m…Рu В…Рn|mc=m…Щu Вin|oc-bs=m…Щ Вin|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}}'''Yang Earth Monkey'''{{жЛЉйЯ≥|w√єshƒУn|qq=}}гАБ{{ж≥®йЯ≥|гД®ЋЛ гДХгД£|qq=}}гАБ{{lang-ko|лђімЛ†|qq=}}гАБ{{lang-vi|{{Unicode|MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn|qq=}}|qq=}}) is one of the components of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}.
It is the 45th combination in the comprehensive sexagenary cycle, preceded by {{ill|Dingwei|ja|1=Yin Fire Goat|2=ja|дЄБжЬ™|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingwei|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Jiyou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|еЈ±йЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiyou|qq=}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang Five Elements theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the heavenly stem {{ill|Wu|ja|жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|lt=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|2=ja|3=жИК|4=zh|5=жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=}} represents yang earth, and the earthly branch [[:en:Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey (зФ≥)]] represents yang metal; according to the principle of [[:en:Aioi|phase generation]] (earth producing metal).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Monkey (жИКзФ≥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): w√єshƒУn ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 san1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-saru ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-saru ***Onyomi 1: boshi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): musin (лђімЛ†) ** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn
<!-- == * Yang Earth Monkey (жИКзФ≥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): w√єshƒУn ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ng5 san1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: гБ§гБ°гБЃгБИгБХгВЛ (tsuchinoe-saru) ***Onyomi: гБЉгБЛгБЃгБХгВЛ (boka-no-saru) ***Onyomi: гБЉгБЧгВУ (boshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): musin ** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn
--> ==Years of Yang Earth Monkey== A year is designated as a Wushen year if, when the Western calendar year is divided by 60, the remainder is 48. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Wushen''' |- ! [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 41 (1908) вАУ the issuance of the {{ill|Wushen Edict|ja|жИКзФ≥и©ФжЫЄ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen Edict|qq=}}. * In 1968 вАУ the Tet Offensive during the [[:en:Vietnam War|Vietnam War]]. In Vietnamese, it is referred to as {{Unicode|Sбї± kiбїЗn TбЇњt MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn|qq=}} (Incident Festival Wushen).
==Months of Yang Earth Monkey== In years whose last digit in the Western calendar is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Ren|ja|е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|lt=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|2=ja|3=е£ђ|4=zh|5=е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (е£ђ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Ding|ja|дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|lt=Hinoto (дЄБ)|2=ja|3=дЄБ|4=zh|5=дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=}}), the month of July is designated as the month of Wushen. (Note that in this context, вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer to a lunar month or a seasonal period [from [[:en:Liqiu|Rissh≈Ђ]] to the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro]]].)
==Days of Yang Earth Monkey== === Date Selection === The day of Wushen is the 16th day (the final day) of the {{ill|Tengitenj≈Н|ja|е§©дЄАе§©дЄК|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tengitenj≈Н|qq=}}.

==Months of Yang Earth Monkey== In years whose last digit in the Western calendar is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Ren|ja|е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|lt=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|2=ja|3=е£ђ|4=zh|5=е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (е£ђ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Ding|ja|дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|lt=Hinoto (дЄБ)|2=ja|3=дЄБ|4=zh|5=дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=}}), the month of July is designated as the month of Wushen. (Note that in this context, вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer to a lunar month or a seasonal period [from [[:en:Liqiu|Rissh≈Ђ]] to the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro]]].)

In Vietnamese, it is referred to as {{Unicode|Sбї± kiбїЗn TбЇњt MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn|qq=}} (Incident Festival Wushen).
==Months of Yang Earth Monkey== In years whose last digit in the Western calendar is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Ren|ja|е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|lt=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|2=ja|3=е£ђ|4=zh|5=е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (е£ђ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Ding|ja|дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|lt=Hinoto (дЄБ)|2=ja|3=дЄБ|4=zh|5=дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=}}), the month of July is designated as the month of Wushen. (Note that in this context, вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer to a lunar month or a seasonal period [from [[:en:Liqiu|Rissh≈Ђ]] to the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro]]].)
==Days of Yang Earth Monkey== === Date Selection === The day of Wushen is the 16th day (the final day) of the {{ill|Tengitenj≈Н|ja|е§©дЄАе§©дЄК|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tengitenj≈Н|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to е§©дЄАз•Ю}}.

It is the 45th combination in the comprehensive sexagenary cycle, preceded by {{ill|Dingwei|ja|1=Yin Fire Goat|2=ja|дЄБжЬ™|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingwei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Jiyou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|еЈ±йЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiyou|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang Five Elements theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the heavenly stem {{ill|Wu|ja|жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|lt=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|2=ja|3=жИК|4=zh|5=жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=}} represents yang earth, and the earthly branch [[:en:Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey (зФ≥)]] represents yang metal; according to the principle of [[:en:Aioi|phase generation]] (earth producing metal).

(Note that in this context, вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer to a lunar month or a seasonal period [from [[:en:Liqiu|Rissh≈Ђ]] to the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro]]].)

It is the 45th combination in the comprehensive sexagenary cycle, preceded by {{ill|Dingwei|ja|1=Yin Fire Goat|2=ja|дЄБжЬ™|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingwei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Jiyou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|еЈ±йЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiyou|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang Five Elements theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the heavenly stem {{ill|Wu|ja|жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|lt=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|2=ja|3=жИК|4=zh|5=жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=}} represents yang earth, and the earthly branch [[:en:Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey (зФ≥)]] represents yang metal; according to the principle of [[:en:Aioi|phase generation]] (earth producing metal).

In the {{ill|Yin-Yang Five Elements theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the heavenly stem {{ill|Wu|ja|жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|lt=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|2=ja|3=жИК|4=zh|5=жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=}} represents yang earth, and the earthly branch [[:en:Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey (зФ≥)]] represents yang metal; according to the principle of [[:en:Aioi|phase generation]] (earth producing metal).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Monkey (жИКзФ≥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): w√єshƒУn ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 san1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-saru ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-saru ***Onyomi 1: boshi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): musin (лђімЛ†) ** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn

wikidata|WD=Q17641335}}. * In 1968 вАУ the Tet Offensive during the [[:en:Vietnam War|Vietnam War]]. In Vietnamese, it is referred to as {{Unicode|Sбї± kiбїЗn TбЇњt MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn|qq=}} (Incident Festival Wushen).
==Months of Yang Earth Monkey== In years whose last digit in the Western calendar is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Ren|ja|е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|lt=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|2=ja|3=е£ђ|4=zh|5=е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (е£ђ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Ding|ja|дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|lt=Hinoto (дЄБ)|2=ja|3=дЄБ|4=zh|5=дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=}}), the month of July is designated as the month of Wushen. (Note that in this context, вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer to a lunar month or a seasonal period [from [[:en:Liqiu|Rissh≈Ђ]] to the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro]]].)
==Days of Yang Earth Monkey== === Date Selection === The day of Wushen is the 16th day (the final day) of the {{ill|Tengitenj≈Н|ja|е§©дЄАе§©дЄК|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tengitenj≈Н|qq=|ja_comment=е§©дЄАз•Ю|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=е§©дЄАз•Ю|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904781]] Wikidata name: Yang Earth Monkey [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:27, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Monkey|kanji=жИКзФ≥|romaji=tsuchinoe saru|onyomi=bojin|p=w√єshƒУn|w=wu-shen|mi=uвБµвБµ В…Щn|y=mou6 san1|j=mou6 san1|ci=m…Рu В…Рn|mc=m…Щu Вin|oc-bs=m…Щ Вin|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}}'''Yang Earth Monkey'''{{жЛЉйЯ≥|w√єshƒУn|qq=}}гАБ{{ж≥®йЯ≥|гД®ЋЛ гДХгД£|qq=}}гАБ{{lang-ko|лђімЛ†|qq=}}гАБ{{lang-vi|{{Unicode|MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn|qq=}}|qq=}}) is one of the components of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 45th combination in the comprehensive sexagenary cycle, preceded by {{ill|Dingwei|ja|1=Yin Fire Goat|2=ja|дЄБжЬ™|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingwei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Jiyou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|еЈ±йЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiyou|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Monkey (жИКзФ≥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): w√єshƒУn ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 san1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-saru ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-saru ***Onyomi 1: boshi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): musin (лђімЛ†) ** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn

In Vietnamese, it is referred to as {{Unicode|Sбї± kiбїЗn TбЇњt MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn|qq=}} (Incident Festival Wushen).
==Months of Yang Earth Monkey== In years whose last digit in the Western calendar is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Ren|ja|е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|lt=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|2=ja|3=е£ђ|4=zh|5=е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (е£ђ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Ding|ja|дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|lt=Hinoto (дЄБ)|2=ja|3=дЄБ|4=zh|5=дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=}}), the month of July is designated as the month of Wushen. (Note that in this context, вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer to a lunar month or a seasonal period [from [[:en:Liqiu|Rissh≈Ђ]] to the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro]]].)
==Days of Yang Earth Monkey== === Date Selection === The day of Wushen is the 16th day (the final day) of the {{ill|Tengitenj≈Н|ja|е§©дЄАе§©дЄК|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tengitenj≈Н|qq=|ja_comment=е§©дЄАз•Ю|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=е§©дЄАз•Ю|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904781]] Wikidata name: Yang Earth Monkey [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:27, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Monkey|kanji=жИКзФ≥|romaji=tsuchinoe saru|onyomi=bojin|p=w√єshƒУn|w=wu-shen|mi=uвБµвБµ В…Щn|y=mou6 san1|j=mou6 san1|ci=m…Рu В…Рn|mc=m…Щu Вin|oc-bs=m…Щ Вin|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}}'''Yang Earth Monkey'''{{жЛЉйЯ≥|w√єshƒУn|qq=}}гАБ{{ж≥®йЯ≥|гД®ЋЛ гДХгД£|qq=}}гАБ{{lang-ko|лђімЛ†|qq=}}гАБ{{lang-vi|{{Unicode|MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn|qq=}}|qq=}}) is one of the components of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 45th combination in the comprehensive sexagenary cycle, preceded by {{ill|Dingwei|ja|1=Yin Fire Goat|2=ja|дЄБжЬ™|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingwei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Jiyou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|еЈ±йЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiyou|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang Five Elements theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the heavenly stem {{ill|Wu|ja|жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|lt=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|2=ja|3=жИК|4=zh|5=жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=}} represents yang earth, and the earthly branch [[:en:Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey (зФ≥)]] represents yang metal; according to the principle of [[:en:Aioi|phase generation]] (earth producing metal).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Monkey (жИКзФ≥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): w√єshƒУn ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 san1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-saru ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-saru ***Onyomi 1: boshi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): musin (лђімЛ†) ** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn
<!-- == * Yang Earth Monkey (жИКзФ≥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): w√єshƒУn ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ng5 san1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: гБ§гБ°гБЃгБИгБХгВЛ (tsuchinoe-saru) ***Onyomi: гБЉгБЛгБЃгБХгВЛ (boka-no-saru) ***Onyomi: гБЉгБЧгВУ (boshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): musin ** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn
--> ==Years of Yang Earth Monkey== A year is designated as a Wushen year if, when the Western calendar year is divided by 60, the remainder is 48. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Wushen''' |- ! era|Meiji era]] 41 (1908) вАУ the issuance of the {{ill|Wushen Edict|ja|жИКзФ≥и©ФжЫЄ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen Edict|qq=|1=Wushen Edict|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17641335}}. * In 1968 вАУ the Tet Offensive during the [[:en:Vietnam War|Vietnam War]]. In Vietnamese, it is referred to as {{Unicode|Sбї± kiбїЗn TбЇњt MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn|qq=}} (Incident Festival Wushen).
==Months of Yang Earth Monkey== In years whose last digit in the Western calendar is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Ren|ja|е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|lt=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|2=ja|3=е£ђ|4=zh|5=е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (е£ђ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Ding|ja|дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|lt=Hinoto (дЄБ)|2=ja|3=дЄБ|4=zh|5=дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=}}), the month of July is designated as the month of Wushen. (Note that in this context, вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer to a lunar month or a seasonal period [from [[:en:Liqiu|Rissh≈Ђ]] to the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro]]].)
==Days of Yang Earth Monkey== === Date Selection === The day of Wushen is the 16th day (the final day) of the {{ill|Tengitenj≈Н|ja|е§©дЄАе§©дЄК|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tengitenj≈Н|qq=|ja_comment=е§©дЄАз•Ю|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=е§©дЄАз•Ю|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

It is the 45th combination in the comprehensive sexagenary cycle, preceded by {{ill|Dingwei|ja|1=Yin Fire Goat|2=ja|дЄБжЬ™|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingwei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Jiyou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|еЈ±йЕЙ|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiyou|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang Five Elements theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the heavenly stem {{ill|Wu|ja|жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|lt=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|2=ja|3=жИК|4=zh|5=жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=}} represents yang earth, and the earthly branch [[:en:Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey (зФ≥)]] represents yang metal; according to the principle of [[:en:Aioi|phase generation]] (earth producing metal).

In Vietnamese, it is referred to as {{Unicode|Sбї± kiбїЗn TбЇњt MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn|qq=}} (Incident Festival Wushen).
==Months of Yang Earth Monkey== In years whose last digit in the Western calendar is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Ren|ja|е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|lt=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|2=ja|3=е£ђ|4=zh|5=е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (е£ђ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Ding|ja|дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|lt=Hinoto (дЄБ)|2=ja|3=дЄБ|4=zh|5=дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=}}), the month of July is designated as the month of Wushen. (Note that in this context, вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer to a lunar month or a seasonal period [from [[:en:Liqiu|Rissh≈Ђ]] to the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro]]].)
==Days of Yang Earth Monkey== === Date Selection === The day of Wushen is the 16th day (the final day) of the {{ill|Tengitenj≈Н|ja|е§©дЄАе§©дЄК|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tengitenj≈Н|qq=|ja_comment=е§©дЄАз•Ю|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=е§©дЄАз•Ю|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

==Months of Yang Earth Monkey== In years whose last digit in the Western calendar is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Ren|ja|е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|lt=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|2=ja|3=е£ђ|4=zh|5=е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (е£ђ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Ding|ja|дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|lt=Hinoto (дЄБ)|2=ja|3=дЄБ|4=zh|5=дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=}}), the month of July is designated as the month of Wushen. (Note that in this context, вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer to a lunar month or a seasonal period [from [[:en:Liqiu|Rissh≈Ђ]] to the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro]]].)
==Days of Yang Earth Monkey== === Date Selection === The day of Wushen is the 16th day (the final day) of the {{ill|Tengitenj≈Н|ja|е§©дЄАе§©дЄК|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tengitenj≈Н|qq=|ja_comment=е§©дЄАз•Ю|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=е§©дЄАз•Ю|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{ill|Wushen Edict|ja|жИКзФ≥и©ФжЫЄ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen Edict|1=Wushen Edict|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17641335}}. * In 1968 вАУ the Tet Offensive during the [[:en:Vietnam War|Vietnam War]]. In Vietnamese, it is referred to as {{Unicode|Sбї± kiбїЗn TбЇњt MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn|qq=}} (Incident Festival Wushen).
==Months of Yang Earth Monkey== In years whose last digit in the Western calendar is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Ren|ja|е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|lt=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|2=ja|3=е£ђ|4=zh|5=е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (е£ђ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Ding|ja|дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|lt=Hinoto (дЄБ)|2=ja|3=дЄБ|4=zh|5=дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=}}), the month of July is designated as the month of Wushen. (Note that in this context, вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer to a lunar month or a seasonal period [from [[:en:Liqiu|Rissh≈Ђ]] to the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro]]].)
==Days of Yang Earth Monkey== === Date Selection === The day of Wushen is the 16th day (the final day) of the {{ill|Tengitenj≈Н|ja|е§©дЄАе§©дЄК|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tengitenj≈Н|ja_comment=е§©дЄАз•Ю|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=е§©дЄАз•Ю|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardaap (astrologie)]][[cdo:Mu√і-sƒ≠ng]][[de:Erde-Affe]][[hak:V√Ї-sбє≥ћВn]][[ja:жИКзФ≥]][[ko:лђімЛ† (к∞ДмІА)]][[vi:MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn]][[za:Fouhsaen]][[zh-min-nan:B≈НЌШ-sin]][[zh-yue:жИКзФ≥]][[zh:жИКзФ≥]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904781]] Wikidata name: Yang Earth Monkey [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:27, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Monkey|kanji=жИКзФ≥|romaji=tsuchinoe saru|onyomi=bojin|p=w√єshƒУn|w=wu-shen|mi=uвБµвБµ В…Щn|y=mou6 san1|j=mou6 san1|ci=m…Рu В…Рn|mc=m…Щu Вin|oc-bs=m…Щ Вin|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}}'''Yang Earth Monkey'''{{жЛЉйЯ≥|w√єshƒУn|qq=}}гАБ{{ж≥®йЯ≥|гД®ЋЛ гДХгД£|qq=}}гАБ{{lang-ko|лђімЛ†|qq=}}гАБ{{lang-vi|{{Unicode|MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn|qq=}}|qq=}}) is one of the components of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 45th combination in the comprehensive sexagenary cycle, preceded by {{ill|Dingwei|ja|1=Yin Fire Goat|2=ja|дЄБжЬ™|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingwei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Jiyou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|еЈ±йЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiyou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang Five Elements theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the heavenly stem {{ill|Wu|ja|жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|lt=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|2=ja|3=жИК|4=zh|5=жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=}} represents yang earth, and the earthly branch [[:en:Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey (зФ≥)]] represents yang metal; according to the principle of [[:en:Aioi|phase generation]] (earth producing metal).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Monkey (жИКзФ≥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): w√єshƒУn ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 san1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-saru ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-saru ***Onyomi 1: boshi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): musin (лђімЛ†) ** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn

In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 41 (1908) вАУ the issuance of the {{ill|Wushen Edict|ja|жИКзФ≥и©ФжЫЄ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen Edict|1=Wushen Edict|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17641335}}. * In 1968 вАУ the Tet Offensive during the [[:en:Vietnam War|Vietnam War]]. In Vietnamese, it is referred to as {{Unicode|Sбї± kiбїЗn TбЇњt MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn|qq=}} (Incident Festival Wushen).
==Months of Yang Earth Monkey== In years whose last digit in the Western calendar is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Ren|ja|е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|lt=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|2=ja|3=е£ђ|4=zh|5=е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (е£ђ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Ding|ja|дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|lt=Hinoto (дЄБ)|2=ja|3=дЄБ|4=zh|5=дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=}}), the month of July is designated as the month of Wushen. (Note that in this context, вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer to a lunar month or a seasonal period [from [[:en:Liqiu|Rissh≈Ђ]] to the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro]]].)
==Days of Yang Earth Monkey== === Date Selection === The day of Wushen is the 16th day (the final day) of the {{ill|Tengitenj≈Н|ja|е§©дЄАе§©дЄК|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tengitenj≈Н|ja_comment=е§©дЄАз•Ю|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=е§©дЄАз•Ю|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardaap (astrologie)]][[cdo:Mu√і-sƒ≠ng]][[de:Erde-Affe]][[hak:V√Ї-sбє≥ћВn]][[ja:жИКзФ≥]][[ko:лђімЛ† (к∞ДмІА)]][[vi:MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn]][[za:Fouhsaen]][[zh-min-nan:B≈НЌШ-sin]][[zh-yue:жИКзФ≥]][[zh:жИКзФ≥]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904781]] Wikidata name: Yang Earth Monkey [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:27, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Monkey|kanji=жИКзФ≥|romaji=tsuchinoe saru|onyomi=bojin|p=w√єshƒУn|w=wu-shen|mi=uвБµвБµ В…Щn|y=mou6 san1|j=mou6 san1|ci=m…Рu В…Рn|mc=m…Щu Вin|oc-bs=m…Щ Вin|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}}'''Yang Earth Monkey'''{{жЛЉйЯ≥|w√єshƒУn|qq=}}гАБ{{ж≥®йЯ≥|гД®ЋЛ гДХгД£|qq=}}гАБ{{lang-ko|лђімЛ†|qq=}}гАБ{{lang-vi|{{Unicode|MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn|qq=}}|qq=}}) is one of the components of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 45th combination in the comprehensive sexagenary cycle, preceded by {{ill|Dingwei|ja|1=Yin Fire Goat|2=ja|дЄБжЬ™|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingwei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Jiyou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|еЈ±йЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiyou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang Five Elements theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the heavenly stem {{ill|Wu|ja|жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|lt=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|2=ja|3=жИК|4=zh|5=жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=}} represents yang earth, and the earthly branch [[:en:Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey (зФ≥)]] represents yang metal; according to the principle of [[:en:Aioi|phase generation]] (earth producing metal).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Monkey (жИКзФ≥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): w√єshƒУn ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 san1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-saru ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-saru ***Onyomi 1: boshi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): musin (лђімЛ†) ** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn

--> ==Years of Yang Earth Monkey== A year is designated as a Wushen year if, when the Western calendar year is divided by 60, the remainder is 48. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Wushen''' |- ! In Vietnamese, it is referred to as {{Unicode|Sбї± kiбїЗn TбЇњt MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn|qq=}} (Incident Festival Wushen).

In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 41 (1908) вАУ the issuance of the {{ill|Wushen Edict|ja|жИКзФ≥и©ФжЫЄ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen Edict|1=Wushen Edict|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17641335}}. * In 1968 вАУ the Tet Offensive during the [[:en:Vietnam War|Vietnam War]]. In Vietnamese, it is referred to as {{Unicode|Sбї± kiбїЗn TбЇњt MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn|qq=}} (Incident Festival Wushen).
==Months of Yang Earth Monkey== In years whose last digit in the Western calendar is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Ren|ja|е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|lt=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|2=ja|3=е£ђ|4=zh|5=е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (е£ђ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Ding|ja|дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|lt=Hinoto (дЄБ)|2=ja|3=дЄБ|4=zh|5=дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=}}), the month of July is designated as the month of Wushen. (Note that in this context, вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer to a lunar month or a seasonal period [from [[:en:Liqiu|Rissh≈Ђ]] to the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro]]].)
==Days of Yang Earth Monkey== === Date Selection === The day of Wushen is the 16th day (the final day) of the {{ill|Tengitenj≈Н|ja|е§©дЄАе§©дЄК|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tengitenj≈Н|ja_comment=е§©дЄАз•Ю|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=е§©дЄАз•Ю|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardaap (astrologie)]][[cdo:Mu√і-sƒ≠ng]][[de:Erde-Affe]][[hak:V√Ї-sбє≥ћВn]][[ja:жИКзФ≥]][[ko:лђімЛ† (к∞ДмІА)]][[vi:MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn]][[za:Fouhsaen]][[zh-min-nan:B≈НЌШ-sin]][[zh-yue:жИКзФ≥]][[zh:жИКзФ≥]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904781]] Wikidata name: Yang Earth Monkey [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:27, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Monkey|kanji=жИКзФ≥|romaji=tsuchinoe saru|onyomi=bojin|p=w√єshƒУn|w=wu-shen|mi=uвБµвБµ В…Щn|y=mou6 san1|j=mou6 san1|ci=m…Рu В…Рn|mc=m…Щu Вin|oc-bs=m…Щ Вin|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}}'''Yang Earth Monkey'''{{жЛЉйЯ≥|w√єshƒУn|qq=}}гАБ{{ж≥®йЯ≥|гД®ЋЛ гДХгД£|qq=}}гАБ{{lang-ko|лђімЛ†|qq=}}гАБ{{lang-vi|{{Unicode|MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn|qq=}}|qq=}}) is one of the components of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 45th combination in the comprehensive sexagenary cycle, preceded by {{ill|Dingwei|ja|1=Yin Fire Goat|2=ja|дЄБжЬ™|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingwei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Jiyou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|еЈ±йЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiyou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang Five Elements theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the heavenly stem {{ill|Wu|ja|жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|lt=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|2=ja|3=жИК|4=zh|5=жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=}} represents yang earth, and the earthly branch [[:en:Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey (зФ≥)]] represents yang metal; according to the principle of [[:en:Aioi|phase generation]] (earth producing metal).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Monkey (жИКзФ≥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): w√єshƒУn ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 san1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-saru ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-saru ***Onyomi 1: boshi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): musin (лђімЛ†) ** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn

In Vietnamese, it is referred to as {{Unicode|Sбї± kiбїЗn TбЇњt MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn|qq=}} (Incident Festival Wushen).
==Months of Yang Earth Monkey== In years whose last digit in the Western calendar is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Ren|ja|е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|lt=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|2=ja|3=е£ђ|4=zh|5=е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (е£ђ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Ding|ja|дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|lt=Hinoto (дЄБ)|2=ja|3=дЄБ|4=zh|5=дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=}}), the month of July is designated as the month of Wushen. ==Months of Yang Earth Monkey== In years whose last digit in the Western calendar is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Ren|ja|е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|lt=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|2=ja|3=е£ђ|4=zh|5=е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (е£ђ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Ding|ja|дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|lt=Hinoto (дЄБ)|2=ja|3=дЄБ|4=zh|5=дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=}}), the month of July is designated as the month of Wushen. (Note that in this context, вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer to a lunar month or a seasonal period [from [[:en:Liqiu|Rissh≈Ђ]] to the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro]]].)
==Days of Yang Earth Monkey== === Date Selection === The day of Wushen is the 16th day (the final day) of the {{ill|Tengitenj≈Н|ja|е§©дЄАе§©дЄК|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tengitenj≈Н|ja_comment=е§©дЄАз•Ю|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=е§©дЄАз•Ю|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 41 (1908) вАУ the issuance of the {{ill|Wushen Edict|ja|жИКзФ≥и©ФжЫЄ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen Edict|1=Wushen Edict|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17641335}}. * In 1968 вАУ the Tet Offensive during the [[:en:Vietnam War|Vietnam War]]. In Vietnamese, it is referred to as {{Unicode|Sбї± kiбїЗn TбЇњt MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn|qq=}} (Incident Festival Wushen).
==Months of Yang Earth Monkey== In years whose last digit in the Western calendar is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Ren|ja|е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|lt=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|2=ja|3=е£ђ|4=zh|5=е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (е£ђ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Ding|ja|дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|lt=Hinoto (дЄБ)|2=ja|3=дЄБ|4=zh|5=дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=}}), the month of July is designated as the month of Wushen. (Note that in this context, вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer to a lunar month or a seasonal period [from [[:en:Liqiu|Rissh≈Ђ]] to the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro]]].)
==Days of Yang Earth Monkey== === Date Selection === The day of Wushen is the 16th day (the final day) of the {{ill|Tengitenj≈Н|ja|е§©дЄАе§©дЄК|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tengitenj≈Н|ja_comment=е§©дЄАз•Ю|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=е§©дЄАз•Ю|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardaap (astrologie)]][[cdo:Mu√і-sƒ≠ng]][[de:Erde-Affe]][[hak:V√Ї-sбє≥ћВn]][[ja:жИКзФ≥]][[ko:лђімЛ† (к∞ДмІА)]][[vi:MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn]][[za:Fouhsaen]][[zh-min-nan:B≈НЌШ-sin]][[zh-yue:жИКзФ≥]][[zh:жИКзФ≥]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904781]] Wikidata name: Yang Earth Monkey [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:27, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Monkey|kanji=жИКзФ≥|romaji=tsuchinoe saru|onyomi=bojin|p=w√єshƒУn|w=wu-shen|mi=uвБµвБµ В…Щn|y=mou6 san1|j=mou6 san1|ci=m…Рu В…Рn|mc=m…Щu Вin|oc-bs=m…Щ Вin|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}}'''Yang Earth Monkey'''{{жЛЉйЯ≥|w√єshƒУn|qq=}}гАБ{{ж≥®йЯ≥|гД®ЋЛ гДХгД£|qq=}}гАБ{{lang-ko|лђімЛ†|qq=}}гАБ{{lang-vi|{{Unicode|MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn|qq=}}|qq=}}) is one of the components of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 45th combination in the comprehensive sexagenary cycle, preceded by {{ill|Dingwei|ja|1=Yin Fire Goat|2=ja|дЄБжЬ™|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingwei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Jiyou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|еЈ±йЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiyou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang Five Elements theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the heavenly stem {{ill|Wu|ja|жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|lt=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|2=ja|3=жИК|4=zh|5=жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=}} represents yang earth, and the earthly branch [[:en:Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey (зФ≥)]] represents yang metal; according to the principle of [[:en:Aioi|phase generation]] (earth producing metal).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Monkey (жИКзФ≥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): w√єshƒУn ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 san1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-saru ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-saru ***Onyomi 1: boshi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): musin (лђімЛ†) ** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn

In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 41 (1908) вАУ the issuance of the {{ill|Wushen Edict|ja|жИКзФ≥и©ФжЫЄ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen Edict|1=Wushen Edict|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17641335}}. * In 1968 вАУ the Tet Offensive during the [[:en:Vietnam War|Vietnam War]]. In Vietnamese, it is referred to as {{Unicode|Sбї± kiбїЗn TбЇњt MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn|qq=}} (Incident Festival Wushen).
==Months of Yang Earth Monkey== In years whose last digit in the Western calendar is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Ren|ja|е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|lt=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|2=ja|3=е£ђ|4=zh|5=е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (е£ђ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Ding|ja|дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|lt=Hinoto (дЄБ)|2=ja|3=дЄБ|4=zh|5=дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=}}), the month of July is designated as the month of Wushen. (Note that in this context, вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer to a lunar month or a seasonal period [from [[:en:Liqiu|Rissh≈Ђ]] to the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro]]].)
==Days of Yang Earth Monkey== === Date Selection === The day of Wushen is the 16th day (the final day) of the {{ill|Tengitenj≈Н|ja|е§©дЄАе§©дЄК|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tengitenj≈Н|ja_comment=е§©дЄАз•Ю|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=е§©дЄАз•Ю|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardaap (astrologie)]][[cdo:Mu√і-sƒ≠ng]][[de:Erde-Affe]][[hak:V√Ї-sбє≥ћВn]][[ja:жИКзФ≥]][[ko:лђімЛ† (к∞ДмІА)]][[vi:MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn]][[za:Fouhsaen]][[zh-min-nan:B≈НЌШ-sin]][[zh-yue:жИКзФ≥]][[zh:жИКзФ≥]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904781]] Wikidata name: Yang Earth Monkey [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:27, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Monkey|kanji=жИКзФ≥|romaji=tsuchinoe saru|onyomi=bojin|p=w√єshƒУn|w=wu-shen|mi=uвБµвБµ В…Щn|y=mou6 san1|j=mou6 san1|ci=m…Рu В…Рn|mc=m…Щu Вin|oc-bs=m…Щ Вin|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}}'''Yang Earth Monkey'''{{жЛЉйЯ≥|w√єshƒУn|qq=}}гАБ{{ж≥®йЯ≥|гД®ЋЛ гДХгД£|qq=}}гАБ{{lang-ko|лђімЛ†|qq=}}гАБ{{lang-vi|{{Unicode|MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn|qq=}}|qq=}}) is one of the components of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 45th combination in the comprehensive sexagenary cycle, preceded by {{ill|Dingwei|ja|1=Yin Fire Goat|2=ja|дЄБжЬ™|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingwei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Jiyou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|еЈ±йЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiyou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang Five Elements theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the heavenly stem {{ill|Wu|ja|жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|lt=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|2=ja|3=жИК|4=zh|5=жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=}} represents yang earth, and the earthly branch [[:en:Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey (зФ≥)]] represents yang metal; according to the principle of [[:en:Aioi|phase generation]] (earth producing metal).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Monkey (жИКзФ≥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): w√єshƒУn ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 san1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-saru ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-saru ***Onyomi 1: boshi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): musin (лђімЛ†) ** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn

--> ==Years of Yang Earth Monkey== A year is designated as a Wushen year if, when the Western calendar year is divided by 60, the remainder is 48. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Wushen''' |- ! In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 41 (1908) вАУ the issuance of the {{ill|Wushen Edict|ja|жИКзФ≥и©ФжЫЄ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen Edict|1=Wushen Edict|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17641335}}. * In 1968 вАУ the Tet Offensive during the [[:en:Vietnam War|Vietnam War]]. In Vietnamese, it is referred to as {{Unicode|Sбї± kiбїЗn TбЇњt MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn|qq=}} (Incident Festival Wushen).
==Months of Yang Earth Monkey== In years whose last digit in the Western calendar is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Ren|ja|е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|lt=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|2=ja|3=е£ђ|4=zh|5=е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (е£ђ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Ding|ja|дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|lt=Hinoto (дЄБ)|2=ja|3=дЄБ|4=zh|5=дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=}}), the month of July is designated as the month of Wushen. (Note that in this context, вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer to a lunar month or a seasonal period [from [[:en:Liqiu|Rissh≈Ђ]] to the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro]]].)
==Days of Yang Earth Monkey== === Date Selection === The day of Wushen is the 16th day (the final day) of the {{ill|Tengitenj≈Н|ja|е§©дЄАе§©дЄК|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tengitenj≈Н|ja_comment=е§©дЄАз•Ю|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=е§©дЄАз•Ю|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardaap (astrologie)]][[cdo:Mu√і-sƒ≠ng]][[de:Erde-Affe]][[hak:V√Ї-sбє≥ћВn]][[ja:жИКзФ≥]][[ko:лђімЛ† (к∞ДмІА)]][[vi:MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn]][[za:Fouhsaen]][[zh-min-nan:B≈НЌШ-sin]][[zh-yue:жИКзФ≥]][[zh:жИКзФ≥]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904781]] Wikidata name: Yang Earth Monkey [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:27, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Monkey|kanji=жИКзФ≥|romaji=tsuchinoe saru|onyomi=bojin|p=w√єshƒУn|w=wu-shen|mi=uвБµвБµ В…Щn|y=mou6 san1|j=mou6 san1|ci=m…Рu В…Рn|mc=m…Щu Вin|oc-bs=m…Щ Вin|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}'''Yang Earth Monkey'''{{жЛЉйЯ≥|w√єshƒУn|qq=}}гАБ{{ж≥®йЯ≥|гД®ЋЛ гДХгД£|qq=}}гАБ{{lang-ko|лђімЛ†|qq=}}гАБ{{lang-vi|{{Unicode|MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn|qq=}}|qq=}}) is one of the components of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 45th combination in the comprehensive sexagenary cycle, preceded by {{ill|Dingwei|ja|1=Yin Fire Goat|2=ja|дЄБжЬ™|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingwei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Jiyou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|еЈ±йЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiyou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang Five Elements theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the heavenly stem {{ill|Wu|ja|жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|lt=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|2=ja|3=жИК|4=zh|5=жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=}} represents yang earth, and the earthly branch [[:en:Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey (зФ≥)]] represents yang metal; according to the principle of [[:en:Aioi|phase generation]] (earth producing metal).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Monkey (жИКзФ≥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): w√єshƒУn ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 san1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-saru ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-saru ***Onyomi 1: boshi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): musin (лђімЛ†) ** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn
<!-- == * Yang Earth Monkey (жИКзФ≥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): w√єshƒУn ** Cantonese (Jyutping): ng5 san1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: гБ§гБ°гБЃгБИгБХгВЛ (tsuchinoe-saru) ***Onyomi: гБЉгБЛгБЃгБХгВЛ (boka-no-saru) ***Onyomi: гБЉгБЧгВУ (boshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): musin ** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn
--> ==Years of Yang Earth Monkey== A year is designated as a Wushen year if, when the Western calendar year is divided by 60, the remainder is 48. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Wushen''' |- ! In Vietnamese, it is referred to as {{Unicode|Sбї± kiбїЗn TбЇњt MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn|qq=}} (Incident Festival Wushen).
==Months of Yang Earth Monkey== In years whose last digit in the Western calendar is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Ren|ja|е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|lt=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|2=ja|3=е£ђ|4=zh|5=е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (е£ђ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Ding|ja|дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|lt=Hinoto (дЄБ)|2=ja|3=дЄБ|4=zh|5=дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=}}), the month of July is designated as the month of Wushen. In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 41 (1908) вАУ the issuance of the {{ill|Wushen Edict|ja|жИКзФ≥и©ФжЫЄ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen Edict|1=Wushen Edict|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17641335}}. * In 1968 вАУ the Tet Offensive during the [[:en:Vietnam War|Vietnam War]]. In Vietnamese, it is referred to as {{Unicode|Sбї± kiбїЗn TбЇњt MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn|qq=}} (Incident Festival Wushen).
==Months of Yang Earth Monkey== In years whose last digit in the Western calendar is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Ren|ja|е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|lt=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|2=ja|3=е£ђ|4=zh|5=е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (е£ђ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Ding|ja|дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|lt=Hinoto (дЄБ)|2=ja|3=дЄБ|4=zh|5=дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=}}), the month of July is designated as the month of Wushen. (Note that in this context, вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer to a lunar month or a seasonal period [from [[:en:Liqiu|Rissh≈Ђ]] to the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro]]].)
==Days of Yang Earth Monkey== === Date Selection === The day of Wushen is the 16th day (the final day) of the {{ill|Tengitenj≈Н|ja|е§©дЄАе§©дЄК|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tengitenj≈Н|ja_comment=е§©дЄАз•Ю|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=е§©дЄАз•Ю|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardaap (astrologie)]][[cdo:Mu√і-sƒ≠ng]][[de:Erde-Affe]][[hak:V√Ї-sбє≥ћВn]][[ja:жИКзФ≥]][[ko:лђімЛ† (к∞ДмІА)]][[vi:MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn]][[za:Fouhsaen]][[zh-min-nan:B≈НЌШ-sin]][[zh-yue:жИКзФ≥]][[zh:жИКзФ≥]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904781]] Wikidata name: Yang Earth Monkey [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:27, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Monkey|kanji=жИКзФ≥|romaji=tsuchinoe saru|onyomi=bojin|p=w√єshƒУn|w=wu-shen|mi=uвБµвБµ В…Щn|y=mou6 san1|j=mou6 san1|ci=m…Рu В…Рn|mc=m…Щu Вin|oc-bs=m…Щ Вin|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}'''Yang Earth Monkey'''{{жЛЉйЯ≥|w√єshƒУn|qq=}}гАБ{{ж≥®йЯ≥|гД®ЋЛ гДХгД£|qq=}}гАБ{{lang-ko|лђімЛ†|qq=}}гАБ{{lang-vi|{{Unicode|MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn|qq=}}|qq=}}) is one of the components of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 45th combination in the comprehensive sexagenary cycle, preceded by {{ill|Dingwei|ja|1=Yin Fire Goat|2=ja|дЄБжЬ™|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingwei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Jiyou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|еЈ±йЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiyou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang Five Elements theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the heavenly stem {{ill|Wu|ja|жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|lt=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|2=ja|3=жИК|4=zh|5=жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=}} represents yang earth, and the earthly branch [[:en:Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey (зФ≥)]] represents yang metal; according to the principle of [[:en:Aioi|phase generation]] (earth producing metal).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Monkey (жИКзФ≥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): w√єshƒУn ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 san1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-saru ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-saru ***Onyomi 1: boshi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): musin (лђімЛ†) ** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn

--> ==Years of Yang Earth Monkey== A year is designated as a Wushen year if, when the Western calendar year is divided by 60, the remainder is 48. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Wushen''' |- ! In Vietnamese, it is referred to as {{Unicode|Sбї± kiбїЗn TбЇњt MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn|qq=}} (Incident Festival Wushen).

==Months of Yang Earth Monkey== In years whose last digit in the Western calendar is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Ren|ja|е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|lt=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|2=ja|3=е£ђ|4=zh|5=е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (е£ђ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Ding|ja|дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|lt=Hinoto (дЄБ)|2=ja|3=дЄБ|4=zh|5=дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=}}), the month of July is designated as the month of Wushen. (Note that in this context, вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer to a lunar month or a seasonal period [from [[:en:Liqiu|Rissh≈Ђ]] to the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro]]].)

In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 41 (1908) вАУ the issuance of the {{ill|Wushen Edict|ja|жИКзФ≥и©ФжЫЄ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen Edict|1=Wushen Edict|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17641335}}. * In 1968 вАУ the Tet Offensive during the [[:en:Vietnam War|Vietnam War]]. In Vietnamese, it is referred to as {{Unicode|Sбї± kiбїЗn TбЇњt MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn|qq=}} (Incident Festival Wushen).
==Months of Yang Earth Monkey== In years whose last digit in the Western calendar is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Ren|ja|е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|lt=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|2=ja|3=е£ђ|4=zh|5=е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (е£ђ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Ding|ja|дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|lt=Hinoto (дЄБ)|2=ja|3=дЄБ|4=zh|5=дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=}}), the month of July is designated as the month of Wushen. (Note that in this context, вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer to a lunar month or a seasonal period [from [[:en:Liqiu|Rissh≈Ђ]] to the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro]]].)
==Days of Yang Earth Monkey== === Date Selection === The day of Wushen is the 16th day (the final day) of the {{ill|Tengitenj≈Н|ja|е§©дЄАе§©дЄК|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tengitenj≈Н|ja_comment=е§©дЄАз•Ю|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=е§©дЄАз•Ю|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

It is the 45th combination in the comprehensive sexagenary cycle, preceded by {{ill|Dingwei|ja|1=Yin Fire Goat|2=ja|дЄБжЬ™|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingwei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Jiyou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|еЈ±йЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiyou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang Five Elements theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the heavenly stem {{ill|Wu|ja|жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|lt=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|2=ja|3=жИК|4=zh|5=жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=}} represents yang earth, and the earthly branch [[:en:Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey (зФ≥)]] represents yang metal; according to the principle of [[:en:Aioi|phase generation]] (earth producing metal).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Monkey (жИКзФ≥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): w√єshƒУn ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 san1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-saru ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-saru ***Onyomi 1: boshi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): musin (лђімЛ†) ** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn

--> ==Years of Yang Earth Monkey== A year is designated as a Wushen year if, when the Western calendar year is divided by 60, the remainder is 48. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Years of Wushen''' |- ! ==Months of Yang Earth Monkey== In years whose last digit in the Western calendar is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Ren|ja|е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|lt=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|2=ja|3=е£ђ|4=zh|5=е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (е£ђ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Ding|ja|дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|lt=Hinoto (дЄБ)|2=ja|3=дЄБ|4=zh|5=дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=}}), the month of July is designated as the month of Wushen. (Note that in this context, вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer to a lunar month or a seasonal period [from [[:en:Liqiu|Rissh≈Ђ]] to the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro]]].)

It is the 45th combination in the comprehensive sexagenary cycle, preceded by {{ill|Dingwei|ja|1=Yin Fire Goat|2=ja|дЄБжЬ™|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingwei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Jiyou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|еЈ±йЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiyou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang Five Elements theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the heavenly stem {{ill|Wu|ja|жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|lt=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|2=ja|3=жИК|4=zh|5=жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=}} represents yang earth, and the earthly branch [[:en:Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey (зФ≥)]] represents yang metal; according to the principle of [[:en:Aioi|phase generation]] (earth producing metal).

In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 41 (1908) вАУ the issuance of the {{ill|Wushen Edict|ja|жИКзФ≥и©ФжЫЄ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen Edict|1=Wushen Edict|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17641335}}. * In 1968 вАУ the Tet Offensive during the [[:en:Vietnam War|Vietnam War]]. In Vietnamese, it is referred to as {{Unicode|Sбї± kiбїЗn TбЇњt MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn|qq=}} (Incident Festival Wushen).
==Months of Yang Earth Monkey== In years whose last digit in the Western calendar is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Ren|ja|е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|lt=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|2=ja|3=е£ђ|4=zh|5=е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (е£ђ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Ding|ja|дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|lt=Hinoto (дЄБ)|2=ja|3=дЄБ|4=zh|5=дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=}}), the month of July is designated as the month of Wushen. (Note that in this context, вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer to a lunar month or a seasonal period [from [[:en:Liqiu|Rissh≈Ђ]] to the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro]]].)
==Days of Yang Earth Monkey== === Date Selection === The day of Wushen is the 16th day (the final day) of the {{ill|Tengitenj≈Н|ja|е§©дЄАе§©дЄК|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tengitenj≈Н|ja_comment=е§©дЄАз•Ю|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=е§©дЄАз•Ю|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

==Days of Yang Earth Monkey== === Date Selection === The day of Wushen is the 16th day (the final day) of the {{ill|Tengitenj≈Н|ja|е§©дЄАе§©дЄК|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tengitenj≈Н|ja_comment=е§©дЄАз•Ю|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=е§©дЄАз•Ю|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

It is the 45th combination in the comprehensive sexagenary cycle, preceded by {{ill|Dingwei|ja|1=Yin Fire Goat|2=ja|дЄБжЬ™|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingwei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Jiyou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|еЈ±йЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiyou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang Five Elements theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the heavenly stem {{ill|Wu|ja|жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|lt=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|2=ja|3=жИК|4=zh|5=жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=}} represents yang earth, and the earthly branch [[:en:Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey (зФ≥)]] represents yang metal; according to the principle of [[:en:Aioi|phase generation]] (earth producing metal).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Monkey (жИКзФ≥) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): w√єshƒУn ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 san1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-saru ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-saru ***Onyomi 1: boshi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): musin (лђімЛ†) ** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn

In Vietnamese, it is referred to as {{Unicode|Sбї± kiбїЗn TбЇњt MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn|qq=}} (Incident Festival Wushen).

In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 41 (1908) вАУ the issuance of the {{ill|Wushen Edict|ja|жИКзФ≥и©ФжЫЄ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen Edict|1=Wushen Edict|comment=changed title based on In Vietnamese, it is referred to as {{Unicode|Sбї± kiбїЗn TбЇњt MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn|qq=}} (Incident Festival Wushen).
==Months of Yang Earth Monkey== In years whose last digit in the Western calendar is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Ren|ja|е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|lt=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|2=ja|3=е£ђ|4=zh|5=е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (е£ђ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Ding|ja|дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|lt=Hinoto (дЄБ)|2=ja|3=дЄБ|4=zh|5=дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=}}), the month of July is designated as the month of Wushen. (Note that in this context, вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer to a lunar month or a seasonal period [from [[:en:Liqiu|Rissh≈Ђ]] to the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro]]].)
==Days of Yang Earth Monkey== === Date Selection === The day of Wushen is the 16th day (the final day) of the {{ill|Tengitenj≈Н|ja|е§©дЄАе§©дЄК|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tengitenj≈Н|ja_comment=е§©дЄАз•Ю|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=е§©дЄАз•Ю|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

It is the 45th combination in the comprehensive sexagenary cycle, preceded by {{ill|Dingwei|ja|1=Yin Fire Goat|2=ja|дЄБжЬ™|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingwei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Jiyou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|еЈ±йЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiyou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang Five Elements theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the heavenly stem {{ill|Wu|ja|жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|lt=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|2=ja|3=жИК|4=zh|5=жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=}} represents yang earth, and the earthly branch [[:en:Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey (зФ≥)]] represents yang metal; according to the principle of [[:en:Aioi|phase generation]] (earth producing metal).

In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 41 (1908) вАУ the issuance of the {{ill|Wushen Edict|ja|жИКзФ≥и©ФжЫЄ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen Edict|1=Wushen Edict|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17641335}}. * In 1968 вАУ the Tet Offensive during the [[:en:Vietnam War|Vietnam War]]. In Vietnamese, it is referred to as {{Unicode|Sбї± kiбїЗn TбЇњt MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn|qq=}} (Incident Festival Wushen).
==Months of Yang Earth Monkey== In years whose last digit in the Western calendar is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Ren|ja|е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|lt=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|2=ja|3=е£ђ|4=zh|5=е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (е£ђ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Ding|ja|дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|lt=Hinoto (дЄБ)|2=ja|3=дЄБ|4=zh|5=дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=}}), the month of July is designated as the month of Wushen. (Note that in this context, вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer to a lunar month or a seasonal period [from [[:en:Liqiu|Rissh≈Ђ]] to the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|Hakuro]]].)
==Days of Yang Earth Monkey== === Date Selection === The day of Wushen is the 16th day (the final day) of the {{ill|Tengitenj≈Н|ja|е§©дЄАе§©дЄК|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tengitenj≈Н|ja_comment=е§©дЄАз•Ю|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=е§©дЄАз•Ю|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

Wikidata name: Yang Earth Monkey
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:27, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}}
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Monkey|kanji=жИКзФ≥|romaji=tsuchinoe saru|onyomi=bojin|p=w√єshƒУn|w=wu-shen|mi=uвБµвБµ  В…Щn|y=mou6 san1|j=mou6 san1|ci=m…Рu  В…Рn|mc=m…Щu  Вin|oc-bs=m…Щ  Вin|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}'''Yang Earth Monkey'''{{жЛЉйЯ≥|w√єshƒУn|qq=}}гАБ{{ж≥®йЯ≥|гД®ЋЛ гДХгД£|qq=}}гАБ{{lang-ko|лђімЛ†|qq=}}гАБ{{lang-vi|{{Unicode|MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn|qq=}}|qq=}}) is one of the components of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 45th combination in the comprehensive sexagenary cycle, preceded by {{ill|Dingwei|ja|1=Yin Fire Goat|2=ja|дЄБжЬ™|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingwei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Jiyou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|еЈ±йЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiyou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang Five Elements theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the heavenly stem {{ill|Wu|ja|жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|lt=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|2=ja|3=жИК|4=zh|5=жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=}} represents yang earth, and the earthly branch {{ill|Monkey (zodiac)|en|Monkey (zodiac)|WD=Q740674|lt=Monkey (зФ≥)}} represents yang metal; according to the principle of {{ill|Aioi|en|Aioi|WD=Q4697552|lt=phase generation}} (earth producing metal).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Earth Monkey (жИКзФ≥)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): w√єshƒУn
** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 san1
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-saru
***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-saru
***Onyomi 1: boshi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): musin (лђімЛ†)
** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn

***Onyomi: гБЉгБЧгВУ (boshin)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): musin
** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn

==Years of Yang Earth Monkey==
A year is designated as a Wushen year if, when the Western calendar year is divided by 60, the remainder is 48.

=== Events ===
* In {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 41 (1908) вАУ the issuance of the {{ill|Wushen Edict|ja|жИКзФ≥и©ФжЫЄ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen Edict|1=Wushen Edict|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17641335}}.
* In 1968 вАУ the Tet Offensive during the {{ill|Vietnam War|en|Vietnam War|WD=Q8740|lt=Vietnam War}}. In Vietnamese, it is referred to as {{Unicode|Sбї± kiбїЗn TбЇњt MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn|qq=}} (Incident Festival Wushen).

==Months of Yang Earth Monkey==
In years whose last digit in the Western calendar is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Ren|ja|е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|lt=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|2=ja|3=е£ђ|4=zh|5=е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (е£ђ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Ding|ja|дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|lt=Hinoto (дЄБ)|2=ja|3=дЄБ|4=zh|5=дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=}}), the month of July is designated as the month of Wushen. (Note that in this context, вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer to a lunar month or a seasonal period [from {{ill|Liqiu|en|Liqiu|WD=Q1147421|lt=Rissh≈Ђ}} to the day before {{ill|Bailu (solar term)|en|Bailu (solar term)|WD=Q1191003|lt=Hakuro}}].)

==Days of Yang Earth Monkey==
=== Date Selection ===
The day of Wushen is the 16th day (the final day) of the {{ill|Tengitenj≈Н|ja|е§©дЄАе§©дЄК|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tengitenj≈Н|ja_comment=е§©дЄАз•Ю|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=е§©дЄАз•Ю|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}'''Yang Earth Monkey'''{{жЛЉйЯ≥|w√єshƒУn|qq=}}гАБ{{ж≥®йЯ≥|гД®ЋЛ гДХгД£|qq=}}гАБ{{lang-ko|лђімЛ†|qq=}}гАБ{{lang-vi|{{Unicode|MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn|qq=}}|qq=}}) is one of the components of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 45th combination in the comprehensive sexagenary cycle, preceded by {{ill|Dingwei|ja|1=Yin Fire Goat|2=ja|дЄБжЬ™|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingwei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Jiyou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|еЈ±йЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiyou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang Five Elements theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the heavenly stem {{ill|Wu|ja|жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|lt=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|2=ja|3=жИК|4=zh|5=жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=}} represents yang earth, and the earthly branch {{ill|Monkey (zodiac)|en|Monkey (zodiac)|WD=Q740674|lt=Monkey (зФ≥)}} represents yang metal; according to the principle of {{ill|Aioi|en|Aioi|WD=Q4697552|lt=phase generation}} (earth producing metal).

==Pronunciation==

=== Events ===
* In {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 41 (1908) вАУ the issuance of the {{ill|Wushen Edict|ja|жИКзФ≥и©ФжЫЄ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wushen Edict|1=Wushen Edict|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17641335}}.
* In 1968 вАУ the Tet Offensive during the {{ill|Vietnam War|en|Vietnam War|WD=Q8740|lt=Vietnam War}}. In Vietnamese, it is referred to as {{Unicode|Sбї± kiбїЗn TбЇњt MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn|qq=}} (Incident Festival Wushen).

==Months of Yang Earth Monkey==
In years whose last digit in the Western calendar is 2 or 7 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Ren|ja|е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|lt=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|2=ja|3=е£ђ|4=zh|5=е£ђ|1=Mizunoe (е£ђ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (е£ђ)|qq=}} and {{ill|Ding|ja|дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|lt=Hinoto (дЄБ)|2=ja|3=дЄБ|4=zh|5=дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=}}), the month of July is designated as the month of Wushen. (Note that in this context, вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer to a lunar month or a seasonal period [from {{ill|Liqiu|en|Liqiu|WD=Q1147421|lt=Rissh≈Ђ}} to the day before {{ill|Bailu (solar term)|en|Bailu (solar term)|WD=Q1191003|lt=Hakuro}}].)

==Days of Yang Earth Monkey==
=== Date Selection ===
The day of Wushen is the 16th day (the final day) of the {{ill|Tengitenj≈Н|ja|е§©дЄАе§©дЄК|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tengitenj≈Н|ja_comment=е§©дЄАз•Ю|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=е§©дЄАз•Ю|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Monkey|kanji=жИКзФ≥|romaji=tsuchinoe saru|onyomi=bojin|p=w√єshƒУn|w=wu-shen|mi=uвБµвБµ  В…Щn|y=mou6 san1|j=mou6 san1|ci=m…Рu  В…Рn|mc=m…Щu  Вin|oc-bs=m…Щ  Вin|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}'''Yang Earth Monkey'''{{жЛЉйЯ≥|w√єshƒУn|qq=}}гАБ{{ж≥®йЯ≥|гД®ЋЛ гДХгД£|qq=}}гАБ{{lang-ko|лђімЛ†|qq=}}гАБ{{lang-vi|{{Unicode|MбЇ≠u Th√Ґn|qq=}}|qq=}}) is one of the components of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 45th combination in the comprehensive sexagenary cycle, preceded by {{ill|Dingwei|ja|1=Yin Fire Goat|2=ja|дЄБжЬ™|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingwei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Jiyou|ja|1=Yin Earth Rooster|2=ja|еЈ±йЕЙ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiyou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang Five Elements theory|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the heavenly stem {{ill|Wu|ja|жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|lt=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|2=ja|3=жИК|4=zh|5=жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=}} represents yang earth, and the earthly branch {{ill|Monkey (zodiac)|en|Monkey (zodiac)|WD=Q740674|lt=Monkey (зФ≥)}} represents yang metal; according to the principle of {{ill|Aioi|en|Aioi|WD=Q4697552|lt=phase generation}} (earth producing metal).
